reviews.comment:
Lugar bastante caído y descuidado.
Le falta personal en minimarket, faltan playeros, los baños no son muy higiénicos, falta papel, los secadores de manos no funcionan.
ACA, a po erse las pilas.
Con muy poco podría estar mucho mejor.

(Translated by Google)
The place is pretty run-down and neglected.
The convenience store is understaffed, there's a lack of beach attendants, the bathrooms aren't very hygienic, there's no toilet paper, and the hand dryers don't work.
Okay, let's get our act together.
It could be much better with very little.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5azczaTN3RRAB
